_doc: Push policy for safe-commit.mjs. Matched against `git remote get-url origin` by substring. own → push allowed (incl. fast-forward to main per the owner's standing rule). readOnly → NEVER push (external/shared production, Engineering-Discipline rule 11): local commit only, loud message. Unknown remote → SAFE DEFAULT: commit locally, do NOT push, warn. Edit this list as repos are added.
